title: The Shy Lanterns Glow
content:
"An album dedicated to the lantern you are. The world is dark at times, and this was created to remind you of the light inside of you. My life has been a series of ups and downs and I hope this resonates somehow. Take care." 
-Insightful 

Here we are back with our 20th release! One of our favorites Insightful has returned with his second release on Soulection! If you missed his first release ‘Luck & Love’ make sure to listen closely and hear the progression from 10 months ago. Insightful is one of the most genuine (humble) and talented individuals we know. This album is really deep and it speaks volumes through his sound selection. We advise you to be open minded and allow this music to tap into your mind, soul an third eye. Break away from sound preference, just listen. 

Enjoy.
